titleStmt.title: SII 24.259: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 259. (A.R. No. 69 of 1936-37.) SOUTH WALL OF THE FOURTH PRĀKĀRA, RIGHT OF ENTRANCE.

summary.p: Records a gift of land for offerings to the god during the early morning service by Bhāradvājakulatilakan Śrīrāma Bhaṭṭaṉ of the temple of Tirukkuḻalūdina-Piḷḷai (Kṛishṇa) consecrated by Umādēvī, the queen of Vīra-Vallāḷadēva at Dōrasamudra. The donor lived in the time of Naraharibhūpāla (Vīra-Narasiṁha II) who is attributed the title Chōḷēndrapratishṭhāguru. The details of the date viz. Śaka 1154, Nandana, Chittirai, Svāti, Tuesday, lunar eclipse, agree regularly for A.D. 1232, April 6, Tuesday, ·77; f.d.n. ·29, lunar eclipse; and the date falls in the reign of Vīra-Nārasiṁha II.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . jayati ciramihāyam rājayatyeṣa kīrttyā viśadayaśada yaivotphullayā lokametam . [apihata] kalikāla pronmiṣatpaṅka paṅkam kuruhanagararājyaśśrīyatīndro vipaścit . tasyāryasyāstiputr(ā)ḥ kuruhapura
yate śrīmataḥ puṇyakīrtteḥ śrīrāmo nāma nāmnā muraripucaraṇadvandva cañcardvipaścit . yaścoḷendrapratiṣṭāgurunaraharibhūpāla labdhorjjitaśrī ssarvorvvīgatakīrttirgurumukhaviditāścaryyamantraprapañcaḥ . svastiśrīḥ śakāptam Āyira
ttu Orunūṟṟaimpattu nālām samvatsaramāna nandanasamvatsarattuc cittiraimā- sattu paurṇṇamāsayuñ cotiyum peṟṟa cevvāykkiḻamai somagrahaṇattu nāḷ viravallāḷadevaṉ Arasi Umādeviyāruṭaiya
dorasamudrattiṟ tirukkuḻalūtiṉa piḷḷai tirumuṟṟattu bhāradvājikulatilakaṉ cirāmabhaṭṭaṉ śrīraṅganāthaṉukku veṭiveṟe Amutu ceytaruḷat tirunāmattukkāṇiyāṉa tirukkuṟaippaṟṟut teṉṉoḻukil
veta neṟi kāṭṭiṉāṉ tiruttil tirupputiyatu viḷākattil Iccirāma paṭṭaṉ nāṟpatu poṉṉiṭṭu tiruttiṉa nilam Iruveli Innilam Iruveliyil Uḷḷa Ubhaiyaṅkoṇṭu Iraṇṭu tiruppoṉakam nerkku ner
tayir vārttu mentu Uḻakku neyyamutum paṭaittu ciṟappamutum paṭaittu Amutu ceytaruḷak kaṭavatākavum . Ippaṭi cantira cūriyarkaḷ Uḷḷataṉaiyum cellak kaṭavatāṉamaikku Ivai koyiṟ kaṇakkup
putucceri Uṭaiyāṉ Aḻakiya maṇavāḷap piriyaṉ makaṉ Uttamaṉ Aricaraṇālaiyap piriyaṉṉeḻuttu .—
Digital edition of SII 24.259 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
